authorized_native_mask_access.allowed_content: Binary native observation availability only. No raw traffic-speed values are available in this asset.
authorized_native_mask_access.allowed_purpose: Compute globally causal native elapsed-gap steps and obtain the carry state for each frozen primary-test history window.

base_protocol_references.immutability_policy: This addendum does not modify, replace, or supersede the frozen P52 final protocol or the frozen P58 boundary-history context addendum.

causal_elapsed_requirement.frozen_history_feature_policy: Use the causal effective history mask, globally causal native elapsed-gap carry state, and scenario-specific artificial dropout masks. No imputation is permitted.
causal_elapsed_requirement.window_elapsed_initialization_rule: For target start t, initialize the corrupted-window elapsed-gap recurrence with the native elapsed state at t-13.

invariance_constraints.controlled_dropout_conditions: Use clean native history and the nine frozen manifest-declared primary-test artificial masks.
invariance_constraints.evaluation_order: Chronological target-start order with no shuffle.
invariance_constraints.normalization: Use only frozen train-partition sensor means and standard deviations.

portability_note: Paths rewritten project-root-relative from the frozen original in configs/frozen/.
publication_language_constraint: To reproduce globally causal elapsed-gap features, the binary native observation-availability mask was used from the series start through the primary-test end. Raw traffic speeds were read only from [41680, 52116), and the pre-test interval [41680, 41692) served only as causal history input. Calibration targets were never evaluated or used for tuning.
purpose: Authorize binary native-observation-mask prehistory access only to reproduce the globally causal native elapsed-gap state required by the frozen history-feature policy.

raw_speed_protection_policy.boundary_history_raw_speed_use: Only as causal history input for the first 12 primary-test target windows. Never as a forecast target, metric target, loss target, tuning signal, or normalization source.

target_and_metric_protection.target_metric_mask: Score only native-observed future target cells.
